## Related Issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no feature change, no bug fix)
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, config changes
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `hotfix` — Critical production fix

## Branch Checklist

- [ ] I branched off `develop` (or `main` for hotfix)
- [ ] My branch follows the naming convention (`feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, etc.)
- [ ] This PR targets `develop` (not `main` or `staging`)

## Code Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the Go style (`gofmt`, `golangci-lint` passes)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where applicable
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] No API keys, secrets, or cloud dependencies introduced
- [ ] Everything runs 100% locally
